description: Style noteCrafted from Italy's materials capital Biella, this fila shoe promises a smooth ride and optimal durability. Fila fanboys know the comfort that this brand provides - now, do you need more reasons to buy the DLS Artifice?Product DetailsRound toed grey and black shoe with central lace-ups and shiny synthetic overlaysHeavily padded mesh inner, tongue and collarfoamy rubber midsole upraised at the heelAggressive TPU outsole with flex grooves and patterned lugsMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
